hooks.command:
echo '
=== clock-gate session end ===
Claude must update before closing:
  1. implementation_log.md  — what was done, decisions, benchmark numbers
  2. ai_moments.md          — any new AI accepted/overridden moments
  3. design_decisions.md    — any new architectural choices
  4. continuous_improvement.md — any new flaws or trade-offs identified
If .go files changed without memory updates, that is a Claude failure.
================================'

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'go test.*-bench\|-bench.*go test'; then TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); OUTPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT"; echo "
## Benchmark Capture — $TIMESTAMP
\`\`\`
$OUTPUT
\`\`\`" >> /Users/athatcher/.claude-work/projects/-Users-athatcher-Documents-at-proj-paradox-clock-gate/memory/implementation_log.md; if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -E '[1-9][0-9]* allocs/op' > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'REGRESSION: BenchmarkQuery shows non-zero allocations. Core zero-alloc claim violated. Fix before proceeding.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'go (mod|get)'; then COUNT=$(go list -m all 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$COUNT" -gt 1 ]; then echo "CONSTRAINT VIOLATION: external dependency detected ($COUNT modules). clock-gate must be zero-dependency. Run 'go mod tidy' to inspect and remove."; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'PDX-[0-9]+'; then if ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qF '[RED]' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qF '[GREEN]'; then echo 'COMMIT FORMAT GATE: PDX-N commits must include [RED] or [GREEN] tag. Run commit-ticket skill.'; exit 1; fi; if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qF '[RED]'; then NON_TEST=$(git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null | grep '\.go$' | grep -v '_test\.go$' || true); if [ -n "$NON_TEST" ]; then echo 'RED COMMIT GATE: Non-test Go files staged — write-order evidence destroyed:'; echo "$NON_TEST"; exit 1; fi; echo 'RED COMMIT GATE: Only *_test.go files staged — OK'; else if ! go test ./... > /tmp/clock-gate-test-output.txt 2>&1; then echo 'GREEN COMMIT GATE: Tests failing — commit blocked:'; cat /tmp/clock-gate-test-output.txt; exit 1; fi; fi; else if ! go test ./... > /tmp/clock-gate-test-output.txt 2>&1; then echo 'PRE-COMMIT GATE: Tests failing — commit blocked:'; cat /tmp/clock-gate-test-output.txt; exit 1; fi; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); GO_CHANGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c '\.go$' || true); README_STAGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'README' || true); if [ "$GO_CHANGED" -gt 0 ] && [ "$README_STAGED" -eq 0 ]; then echo 'README CHECK: .go files are staged but README.md is not. If CLI flags, commands, or output format changed, invoke readme-sync skill before committing.'; fi; if echo "$STAGED" | xargs grep -lE '(api_key|secret|password|token|private_key)[[:space:]]*[:=]|[A-Za-z0-9+/]{40,}={0,2}' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '.git'; then echo 'SECRETS SCAN: potential credential pattern detected in staged files. Review before committing.'; exit 1; fi; fi

TARGET=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | grep -o '"[^"]*"$' | tr -d '"'); PROJECT_ROOT="/Users/athatcher/Documents/at-proj/paradox-clock-gate"; RESOLVED=$(python3 -c "import os; print(os.path.realpath('$TARGET'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TARGET"); if [ -n "$RESOLVED" ] && ! echo "$RESOLVED" | grep -q "^$PROJECT_ROOT" && ! echo "$RESOLVED" | grep -q "^/Users/athatcher/.claude-work"; then echo "SCOPE VIOLATION: Write target '$TARGET' is outside project root. Sibling repos (../paradox-platform) are off-limits."; exit 1; fi

TARGET=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | grep -o '"[^"]*"$' | tr -d '"'); if echo "$TARGET" | grep -qE '\.claude/skills/.+/SKILL\.md' && ! echo "$TARGET" | grep -q 'skill-builder/SKILL.md'; then echo '⚠ SKILL-BUILDER GATE: You are writing to a project skill file. STOP if skill-builder 5-phase process (Phase 1 outcome, Phase 1b anchors, Phase 2 killer items, Phase 3 draft, Phase 4 quality tests, Phase 5 compliance) has not been completed and documented in this conversation. The Iron Law: do not write a single line of the skill until all phases are complete. Skill-builder import/copy is the only exception.'; fi
